revisions.what_changed: Initial workshop: 6 Danilo tabs consolidated into 3 content files + dialogue + OpKit. Green-field build (no Bootstrap sources). Web research on Shopify+QBO integration, sales tax automation, ASC 606, inventory accounting, DTC chart of accounts, common financial mistakes.
revisions.quality_rationale: High actionability (Day 1 Essentials, checklists, Survival Five scorecard). Excellent confidence honesty (dual-margin REC-001 treatment). Strong research grounding. Deductions for pre-launch D-grade assumptions and untested connector recommendation.
